response.original_title: The Dalek Chronicles: The Terrorkon Harvest
response.overview: The Terrorkons - ferocious reptilian predators that live in the Lake of Mutations. They provide a natural defence barrier for the Dalek City. But when one of their number steals a Dalek missile, the survival of the Dalek race is suddenly plunged into jeopardy.
response.title: The Dalek Chronicles: The Terrorkon Harvest
